Announcing Kochi's Instant Maid App

Connecting You to Instant Home Care.

Arrowlogicx Tech Pvt Ltd is building Kochi’s most advanced on-demand maid matching platform. Hire verified, rated, and professional domestic helpers in under two minutes.

Our Parent Agency

Powered by Arrowlogicx Tech

Arrowlogicx Tech Pvt Ltd is a premier digital marketing, software consultancy, and systems integration firm based in Vazhakkala, Kochi.

Delivering Smart Solutions for Kerala and Beyond

We specialize in performance marketing, visual identity design, custom CRM integrations, and business process automation. The Instant Maid platform represents our dedication to deploying robust software engineering to resolve everyday consumer problems in local ecosystems.

With a skilled team of developers, data analysts, and campaign strategists, we create tech that moves the needle.

Full-Stack Engineering

Highly scalable API interfaces and mobile apps optimized for local routing.

Performance Marketing

Data-driven audience targeting to scale digital applications and generate verified customer demand.

Business Systems

Architecting custom CRM configurations and operational workflows for local services.

Brand Strategies

Curating memorable, trusted visual identities that appeal directly to urban communities.

Answering Your Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about Arrowlogicx's upcoming service launch in Kochi.

The platform is scheduled for beta launch in Kochi in Q3 2026. Pre-registrations are open right now for both clients seeking domestic help and professional maids wishing to register as service partners.
Safety and trust are our top priorities. Every candidate goes through a rigorous multi-tier verification process: a background evaluation, a mandatory police verification submission, and a practical household skill assessment conducted by our training coordinators.
Our initial rollout will cover Kakkanad, Vazhakkala, Thrikkakara, and Edappally. We will be expanding to Aluva, Tripunithura, and Central Kochi in the subsequent phases.
We support both one-time instant bookings (for immediate emergency cleaning or meal preps) and recurring monthly subscriptions. Pricing is completely transparent and calculated hourly or per service, which is shared directly on the app before matching.
Pre-Launch Access

Be the First to Experience Seamless Care

Register today to get early invite codes, zero booking fees on your first 3 bookings, and priority support during the beta rollout phase.

ArrowLogicx

Arrowlogicx Tech Pvt Ltd is a modern technology integrations agency developing highly localized digital applications for Kerala's growing tech hubs.
